apps.name: OpenClaw
apps.description: OpenClaw is an open-source AI agent that connects to your messaging apps and takes real actions on your behalf, from running commands and browsing the web to managing files and sending emails.

apps.name: Hermes Agent
apps.description: Hermes Agent is an open-source, self-improving AI agent by Nous Research that runs persistently with memory across sessions, and builds reusable skills from experience. It comes with 40+ built-in tools, including web search, browser automation, and vision, plus scheduled automations and subagents.

apps.name: Kilo Code
apps.description: Kilo Code is an open-source AI coding agent that works across VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI to help developers ship code faster with agentic workflows.

apps.name: Claude Code
apps.description: Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic coding tool that reads your entire codebase, plans and executes changes across files, runs tests, and iterates on failures, all from natural language prompts.

apps.name: pi
apps.description: There are many coding agents, but this one is yours.

apps.name: Janitor AI
apps.description: Janitor AI is a chatbot platform where users create and chat with custom AI characters for interactive roleplay, storytelling, and immersive fiction.

apps.name: ISEKAI ZERO
apps.description: AI adventures. Travel with your favorite characters

apps.name: Lemonade
apps.description: The AI tool for Roblox games.

apps.name: Cline
apps.description: Cline is an open-source AI coding agent that lives inside your IDE, autonomously exploring your codebase, editing files, running terminal commands, and using browser automation.

apps.name: Roo Code
apps.description: Roo Code is a VS Code extension that gives you a team of specialized AI agents with customizable modes for coding, architecture, debugging, and review, all with flexibility across any LLM or model provider.

apps.name: VidMuse
apps.description: Generate music videos, shorts, and more from audio

apps.name: SillyTavern
apps.description: SillyTavern is the LLM frontend for power users, a chat interface that connects to any model and gives deep control through character creation, roleplay, and prompt customization.

apps.name: Mira
apps.description: Mira is a Telegram-native AI assistant.

apps.name: HammerAI
apps.description: Chat with AI characters for free

apps.name: Open WebUI
apps.description: Open WebUI is a self-hosted AI platform providing a chat interface for Large Language Models.

apps.name: Ito
apps.description: Agentic QA platform that actually runs your app
